Chronology of every recorded fact about [[construct]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — A construct can be made by a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — A launcher construct can launch a blast of rock-hard energy when provided with madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The gray soldier is a construct that acts according to direction but lacks life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon wants to know how the construct works.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Madra sealed Dross' vessel inside the cage.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — A construct allows Yerin to speak with Lindon over distances.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — A construct can be made out of madra.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The library has constructs for security.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
